non_authoritative_metadata.effect_provider_refs_disposition: lad_learning selected_authority retains effect/provider refs as data; package assets contain no provider refs, credentials, provider code, plugin/MCP code, or native runner code
non_authoritative_metadata.ops_skill_evidence: entrypoint-authoring skill and references used for full LAD Learning asset rewrite review
non_authoritative_metadata.unselected_catalog_disposition: lad_planning.workflow_source_with_unselected_catalog() inspected; unselected_catalog excluded from shipped selected authority and package assets
non_authoritative_metadata.vendor_selection_disposition: vendor_selection.source() packaged as selected_authority with selected entrypoint prompt and stage-core skill assets; PLUS-0003H preserves approval_policy_hint, conflict_rules, candidate conflict_status, and source refs through selected vendor-selection handoffs; unselected_catalog remains donor metadata and is ignored by compiled selected authority
non_authoritative_metadata.vendor_selection_effect_provider_refs: vendor_selection declares no effect_declarations/provider_ref entries; selected vendor assets define prompt and stage-skill text only and grant no provider, payment, purchase, marketplace, or credential authority
non_authoritative_metadata.vendor_selection_selected_assets: 18 selected assets: one entrypoint_prompt and one stage_skill for each runner-executed vendor_selection stage
